debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓕 : Finset (Set α)
d : ℕ
inst✝ : Finite α
h𝓕 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓕
⊢ card (@SetFamily.hypercubeEdgeFinset α 𝓕) ≤ d * 𝓕.card

failed_attempts: exact card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_sum_ncard_shattered 𝓕 |>.trans h𝓕.sum_ncard_shattered_le_card_nsmul

induction 𝓕 using Shatter.shifting_induction with
  | hereditary 𝓕 h𝓕₁ h𝓕₂ =>
    simp only [hypercubeEdgeFinset, card_filter_product_hereditary_symmDiff_ncard_eq_one h𝓕₁]
    exact h𝓕₂.two_mul_sum_card_le_mul_card
  | shift 𝓕 x _ ih => exact (card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_shift 𝓕 x).trans ih
exact h𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le

obtain ⟨𝒮, h𝒮, hsh, hedge⟩ := exists_shattered_card_eq_and_card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le 𝓕
  rw [← h𝒮, mul_comm]
  exact hedge.trans (sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ _ fun s hs ↦ h𝓕.card_le_of_shatters (hsh _ hs))

classical
  refine (𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_sum_card_shatterAt).trans ?_
  rw [sum_le_card_nsmul, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
  exact fun A hA ↦ h𝓕 _ (𝓕.shatterAt_shatters A hA)

(card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_card_shattered_sets_nonempty 𝓕).trans
    h𝓕.card_shattered_sets_nonempty_le_mul_card

induction ɩ using Finite.induction_empty_option with
  | empty => simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  | option α _ IH =>
    intro 𝓕 d h𝓕
    let 𝓕₀ := 𝓕.filter (none ∉ ·)
    let 𝓕₁ := 𝓕.filter (none ∈ ·)
    let 𝓕₁' : Finset (Set α) := 𝓕₁.image (· \ {none})
    let f : Set α ↪ Set (Option α) := ⟨fun s ↦ some '' s, fun s t h ↦ by simpa using h⟩
    let g : Set α ↪ Set (Option α) := ⟨fun s ↦ (some '' s) ∪ {none}, fun s t h ↦ by
      simp only [Set.union_singleton_insert] at h
      replace h := congr_arg (fun x ↦ x \ {none}) h
      simp only [Set.insert_diff_self_of_not_mem (Set.not_mem_image_of_not_mem (fun _ ↦ by simp)),
        Set.image_diff_singleton, Set.diff_singleton_eq_self (Set.not_mem_image_of_not_mem (fun _ ↦ by simp))] at h
      exact Set.image_injective.2 h⟩
    let 𝓖₀ := 𝓕₀.image (fun s ↦ some ⁻¹' s)
    let 𝓖₁ := 𝓕₁'.image (fun s ↦ some ⁻¹' s)
    have h𝓖₀ : IsNIPWith d (𝓖₀ : Set (Set α)) := by
      intro t ht; apply h𝓕 (t.image some); simpa [Shatters, 𝓖₀] using ht
    have h𝓖₁ : IsNIPWith d (𝓖₁ : Set (Set α)) := by
      intro t ht; apply h𝓕 (t.image some); simpa [Shatters, 𝓖₁] using ht
    have h𝓖₀₁ : IsNIPWith (d - 1) ((𝓖₀ ∩ 𝓖₁) : Set (Set α)) := by
      intro t ht; apply Nat.le_of_add_le_add_right (k := 1)
      rw [tsub_add_cancel_of_le (h𝓕.nontrivial ht.nonempty_shatters)]
      apply h𝓕 (insert none (t.image some)); simpa [Shatters, 𝓖₀, 𝓖₁] using ht
    have h₀ := IH 𝓖₀ d h𝓖₀
    have h₁ := IH 𝓖₁ d h𝓖₁
    have h₀₁ := IH (𝓖₀ ∩ 𝓖₁) (d - 1) h𝓖₀₁
    simp only [hypercubeEdgeFinset, prodMk_mem_hypercubeEdgeFinset, filter_filter] at *
    sorry

induction' inst✝ with α hα IH generalizing 𝓕
  · simp
  · classical
    let a := hα.some
    let 𝓕₀ := 𝓕.filter (a ∉ ·)
    let 𝓕₁ := 𝓕.filter (a ∈ ·)
    let 𝓕₀' := 𝓕₀.image (· \ {a})
    let 𝓕₁' := 𝓕₁.image (· \ {a})
    have h₀ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₀' : Set (Set {x // x ≠ a})) := h𝓕.restrict _
    have h₁ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₁' : Set (Set {x // x ≠ a})) := h𝓕.restrict _
    have hI : IsNIPWith (d - 1) ((𝓕₀' ∩ 𝓕₁') : Set (Set {x // x ≠ a})) := h𝓕.sdiff_restrict a
    have : #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕) = #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕₀') + #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕₁') + 2 * #(𝓕₀' ∩ 𝓕₁') := by
      sorry -- Standard decomposition of hypercube edges along a dimension
    exact this.trans <| (add_le_add (add_le_add (IH h₀) (IH h₁)) $
      two_mul_le_add_of_antitone (hI.card_le_sum_nCr.trans $ sorry) sorry).trans $ by omega

induction ‹Finite α› using Finite.induction_empty_on generalizing 𝓕
  · simp
  · next α _ _ ih =>
    classical
    let a := Classical.arbitrary α
    let 𝓕' := 𝓕.image fun s ↦ if a ∈ s ∧ s \ {a} ∉ 𝓕 then s \ {a} else s
    have h𝓕' : #𝓕' = #𝓕 := card_image_of_injOn fun s hs t ht h ↦ by
      dsimp at h
      split_ifs at h <;> aesop
    have h𝓕'v : IsNIPWith d (𝓕' : Set (Set α)) := sorry
    have hE : #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕) ≤ #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕') := sorry
    rw [← h𝓕']
    exact (hE.trans <| ih h𝓕'v).trans (by rfl)

induction' α using Finite.induction_empty_hyp with α _ ih
  · simp
  · let f : Set (Option α) → Set α := fun s ↦ {x | some x ∈ s}
    let 𝓕₀ := 𝓕.image f
    let 𝓕₁ := (𝓕.filter fun s ↦ none ∈ s ∧ s \ {none} ∈ 𝓕).image f
    have h₀ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₀ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.project none
    have h₁ : IsNIPWith (d.pred) (𝓕₁ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.project_filter none
    rw [𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_option, 𝓕.card_option]
    exact (add_le_add (ih h₀) (ih h₁)).trans (by omega)

induction α using Finite.induction_empty with
  | empty => simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  | step a α _ ih =>
    rw [card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_step a]
    exact (add_le_add (add_le_add (ih h𝓕.isNIPWith_out_zero) (ih h𝓕.isNIPWith_out_one)) <|
      (h𝓕.isNIPWith_in a).card_le_sum_card_shatterFinset).trans (by omega)
simpa [hypercubeEdgeFinset] using h𝓕.sum_card_filter_ncard_symmDiff_eq_one_le

classical
  induction' α using Finite.induction_on with α _ ih
  · simp
  · rw [Finset.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_option]
    set 𝓕₀ := 𝓕.image (· \ {none})
    set 𝓕₁ := (𝓕.filter (none ∈ ·)).image (· \ {none})
    exact (add_le_add (ih h𝓕.option_none_sdiff) <| ih h𝓕.option_none_sdiff_filter_mem).trans <|
      (add_le_add_right (mul_le_mul_left' (card_image_le.trans card_le_card_shatter) _) _).trans <|
      by rw [← add_mul]; exact mul_le_mul_right' (card_image_filter_none_add_card_image_none_sdiff 𝓕) _

rw [hypercubeEdgeFinset, card_filter_product_left]
  exact h𝓕.sum_ncard_symmDiff_eq_one_le

induction' d with d ih generalizing α 𝓕
  · simp [h𝓕.VCDim_eq_zero]
  · induction' α using Finite.induction_on with α _ ih' generalizing 𝓕
    · simp
    · let 𝓕₀ : Finset (Set α) := 𝓕.image (fun s ↦ s \ {none})
      let 𝓕₁ : Finset (Set α) := (𝓕.filter fun s ↦ (s \ {none}) ∈ 𝓕 ∧ none ∈ s).image (fun s ↦ s \ {none})
      sorry

induction' ‹Finite α›
  cases nonempty_fintype α
  exact h𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le

induction' ‹Finite α› using Finite.induction_empty_option with α _ ih
  · simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  · intro 𝓕 h𝓕
    rw [card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_option, mul_add]
    refine (add_le_add (ih h𝓕.option_none_notin) (ih h𝓕.option_none_in)).trans ?_
    rw [← mul_add, ← card_add_filter_option_none]
    exact mul_le_mul_left' h𝓕.card_filter_none_sdiff_le _

induction' ‹Finite α› using Finite.induction_empty_option with α _ ih
  · simp
  · classical
    let f : Set (Option α) → Set α := fun s ↦ s.preimage some
    let 𝓕₀ := 𝓕.image f
    let 𝓕₁ := (𝓕.filter fun s ↦ none ∈ s ∧ s.preimage some ∈ (𝓕.filter (none ∉ ·)).image f).image f
    have h₀ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₀ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.preimage some
    have h₁ : IsNIPWith (d - 1) (𝓕₁ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.inter_none_preimage_some
    rw [𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_option none, 𝓕.card_option none, mul_add]
    refine (add_le_add (add_le_add (ih h₀) (ih h₁)) (by linarith [h₁.card_le_vcdim_none])).trans ?_
    cases d <;> nlinarith

cases nonempty_fintype α
  induction' (univ : Finset α) using Finset.induction_on with a s ha ih generalizing 𝓕
  · simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset, card_eq_zero]
  · let 𝓕₀ := 𝓕.image (· \ {a})
    let 𝓕₁ := 𝓕.filter (a ∈ ·) |>.image (· \ {a})
    let 𝓕₂ := 𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁
    let 𝓕₃ := 𝓕₀ ∪ 𝓕₁
    have h𝓕₃ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₃ : Set (Set s)) := h𝓕.image_diff_singleton a
    have h𝓕₂ : IsNIPWith (d - 1) (𝓕₂ : Set (Set s)) := h𝓕.filter_shatters_diff_singleton a
    rw [card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_insert_α a ha, card_insert_α a ha]
    refine (add_le_add (ih h𝓕₃) (ih h𝓕₂)).trans ?_
    rw [← add_mul, card_inter_add_card_union, mul_comm, ← Nat.mul_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel]
    exact h𝓕.one_le

induction' 𝓕 using Finset.induction_on with A 𝓕 hA ih generalizing d
  · simp
  · induction' d with d ih_d
    · obtain ⟨B, rfl⟩ := h𝓕.card_le_one
      · simp
      · simp [Finset.card_singleton]
    · rw [card_insert_of_not_mem hA, mul_add, mul_one]
      refine (card_filter_insert_le _ _ _).trans (add_le_add ?_ ?_)
      · exact ih (h𝓕.subset $ Set.subset_insert _ _)
      · rw [card_filter_product_ncard_eq_one, card_filter_product_ncard_eq_one]
        exact (card_le_card_shattered_nonempty_bit0 $ h𝓕.subset $ Set.subset_insert _ _).trans
          (by simp [mul_two, ih_d, h𝓕, Shatters]; sorry)
sorry
induction ‹Finite α› using Finite.induction_empty with | hα => exact h𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le

induction' (univ : Finset α) using Finset.induction_on with a s has ih generalizing 𝓕
  · simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset, card_eq_zero.2 (univ_eq_empty.1 (by assumption))]
  · rw [card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_univ_insert a s has]
    refine (add_le_add (ih h𝓕.image_diff_singleton) (ih h𝓕.image_inter_id_diff_singleton)).trans ?_
    simp only [card_image_diff_singleton, card_image_inter_id_diff_singleton]
    rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, mul_one, ← Nat.add_sub_assoc (mul_le_mul_left _ (card_image_inter_id_diff_singleton_le _))]
    exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.sub_le _ _) (by simp [mul_add, Nat.mul_comm])

end SetFamily

induction' inst✝ using Finite.induction_empty_option with α ih generalizing d
  · simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  · intro 𝓕 h𝓕
    rw [card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_option]
    refine (add_le_add (ih _ h𝓕.option_out) (ih _ h𝓕.option_in)).trans ?_
    rw [← mul_add, ← 𝓕.card_option_in_add_card_option_out]
    exact h𝓕.card_option_in_le

induction α using Finite.induction_on generalizing 𝓕
  · simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  · next a α _ ih =>
    let f : Set (insert a (univ : Finset α)) → Set α := (fun x ↦ x.1) ⁻¹' ·
    let 𝓕₀ := (𝓕.filter (a ∉ ·)).image f
    let 𝓕₁ := (𝓕.filter (a ∈ ·)).image f
    have h₀ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₀ : Set (Set α)) := by
      intro s hs; exact h𝓕 (s.map <| Function.Embedding.subtype _) (hs.map _)
    have h₁ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₁ : Set (Set α)) := by
      intro s hs; exact h𝓕 (s.map <| Function.Embedding.subtype _) (hs.map _)
    have h₀₁ : IsNIPWith (d - 1) ((𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁) : Set (Set α)) := by
      intro s hs; rw [← Nat.lt_sub_iff_add_lt (by exact hs.nonempty.card_pos)]
      refine h𝓕 (insert a (s.map <| Function.Embedding.subtype _)) ?_
      rw [Shattered, Finset.coe_insert]
      intro t ht
      obtain ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_powerset_insert.1 ht
      · obtain ⟨A, hA, hAt⟩ := hs (t.preimage (fun x ↦ x.1) (Subtype.val_injective.injOn _))
        exact ⟨A, 𝓕.mem_image.1 hA.1, by simp [hAt, ht]⟩
      · obtain ⟨A, hA, hAt⟩ := hs (t.preimage (fun x ↦ x.1) (Subtype.val_injective.injOn _))
        exact ⟨insert a A, 𝓕.mem_image.1 hA.2, by simp [hAt, ht]⟩
    have : #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕) = #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕₀) + #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕₁) + 2 * #(𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁) := sorry
    have h' := ih h₀
    have h'' := ih h₁
    have h''' : 2 * #(𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁) ≤ #𝓕₀ + #𝓕₁ + (d - 2) * #(𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁) := sorry
    linarith
h𝓕.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le

induction ‹Finite α›
  induction α using Finite.induction_on generalizing 𝓕 d
  · simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  · next x α _ ih =>
    classical
    let f : Set (insert x α) → Set α := (· ∩ (Set.range Subtype.val))
    let 𝓕' : Finset (Set α) := 𝓕.image (· \ {x})
    let 𝓕'' : Finset (Set α) := (𝓕.filter fun A ↦ (if x ∈ A then A \ {x} else A ∪ {x}) ∈ 𝓕).image (· \ {x})
    have h1 : #𝓕 = #𝓕' + #𝓕'' := card_image_add_card_image_filter_sdiff_insert 𝓕 x
    have h2 : #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕) = #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕') + #(hypercubeEdgeFinset 𝓕'') + 2 * #𝓕'' :=
      card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_image_add_card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_filter 𝓕 x
    rw [h2, h1, mul_add]
    refine (add_le_add (add_le_add (ih (h𝓕.project (Set.inclusion <| Set.subset_univ _)))
      (ih (h𝓕.filter_shatters x))) (by rel [h𝓕.filter_shatters x])).trans ?_
    sorry

induction' d with d ih generalizing α 𝓕
  · simp [IsNIPWith_zero_iff.1 h𝓕]
  · induction' inst using Finite.induction_empty_option with α _ ih'
    · obtain rfl | rfl := h𝓕.empty_domain <;> simp
    · set 𝓕₀ : Finset (Set α) := (𝓕.filter (fun s ↦ none ∉ s)).image (· ∩ Set.univ)
      set 𝓕₁ : Finset (Set α) := (𝓕.filter (fun s ↦ none ∈ s)).image (fun s ↦ s \ {none} ∩ Set.univ)
      have h₀₁ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.inter_none_sdiff_none
      have h₀∪₁ : IsNIPWith (d + 1) (𝓕₀ ∪ 𝓕₁ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.union_none_sdiff_none
      rw [card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_option, ← card_inter_add_card_union 𝓕₀ 𝓕₁]
      refine (add_le_add (add_le_add (ih h₀₁) (ih' h₀∪₁)) <| mul_le_mul_left' (by simp) _).trans ?_
      rw [mul_add, ← add_assoc, ← add_assoc, add_right_comm, ← mul_add, card_inter_add_card_union]
      exact add_le_add_right (add_le_add_right (add_le_add_left (ih h₀₁) _) _) _

induction' α using Finite.induction_on with α _ ih
  · simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  · let f : Set (Option α) → Set α := (·.preimage Option.some)
    let 𝓕₀ := (𝓕.filter (Option.none ∉ ·)).image f
    let 𝓕₁ := (𝓕.filter (Option.none ∈ ·)).image f
    have h₀ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₀ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.subset (image_subset_iff.2 fun A hA ↦ (mem_filter.1 hA).1)
    have h₁ : IsNIPWith d (𝓕₁ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.subset (image_subset_iff.2 fun A hA ↦ (mem_filter.1 hA).1)
    have h₀₁ : IsNIPWith (d - 1) (𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁ : Set (Set α)) := h𝓕.shatter_Option_none
    have hf : #(𝓕.filter (Option.none ∉ ·)) = #𝓕₀ := card_image_of_injOn (fun A hA B hB hAB ↦
      Set.ext fun x ↦ by simpa [Set.ext_iff, Option.forall, mem_filter.1 hA, mem_filter.1 hB] using hAB)
    have hg : #(𝓕.filter (Option.none ∈ ·)) = #𝓕₁ := card_image_of_injOn (fun A hA B hB hAB ↦
      Set.ext fun x ↦ by simpa [Set.ext_iff, Option.forall, mem_filter.1 hA, mem_filter.1 hB] using hAB)
    rw [← card_filter_add_card_filter_not 𝓕 (Option.none ∈ ·), mul_add, hf, hg]
    refine (card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_Option_le 𝓕).trans ((add_le_add (ih h₀) (ih h₁)).trans ?_)
    rw [← add_mul, ← Nat.add_sub_assoc (Nat.one_le_of_lt (h𝓕.exists_shattered_of_ncard_pos (by
      by_contra! h; simp [card_eq_zero.1 h] at h₀₁)).2), ← Nat.succ_le_iff, Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos]
    · exact add_le_add_left (two_mul_card_le_card_shatterer_mul_vcdim (𝓕₀ ∩ 𝓕₁)) _
    · exact h𝓕.vcdim_pos_of_nonempty_shatterer

induction α using Finite.induction_empty_option with
  | empty => simp [hypercubeEdgeFinset]
  | option α _ ih =>
    rw [card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_option 𝓕, card_option 𝓕, mul_add]
    exact add_le_add (ih h𝓕.option_univ) (ih h𝓕.option_filter)

classical
  refine (card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_sum_card_shattered 𝓕).trans ?_
  rw [← 𝓕.card_shattered, mul_comm]
  exact sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ d fun s hs ↦ h𝓕 _ <| 𝓕.shatters_of_mem_shattered hs
